nl_query: For each audit log entry related to a result correction, show the result ID, the old marks, the new marks, the name of the user who made the correction, the reason given, and the time elapsed since the previous correction on the same result.
failed_sql: SELECT r.id AS result_id, em_old.marks_awarded AS old_evaluation_marks, em_new.marks_awarded AS new_evaluation_marks, au.display_name AS actor, al.reason AS reason, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM al.created_at - al_prev.created_at) / 3600 AS time_elapsed FROM audit_log al JOIN result r ON r.id = al.entity_id JOIN evaluation_marks em_old ON em_old.attempt_id = al.entity_id AND em_old.question_id = r.script_id JOIN evaluation_marks em_new ON em_new.attempt_id = al.entity_id AND em_new.question_id = r.script_id LEFT JOIN audit_log al_prev ON al_prev.entity_type = 'EVALUATION_ATTEMPT' AND al_prev.entity_id = al.entity_id AND al_prev.created_at < al.created_at JOIN app_user au ON au.id = al.user_id WHERE al.entity_type = 'EVALUATION_ATTEMPT' AND al.action = 'UPDATE' AND em_new.marks_awarded <> em_old.marks_awarded ORDER BY al.created_at DESC
error: Validation failed (joins): Invalid JOIN: No explicit foreign key relationship exists between 'result' and 'audit_log'. Please review the schema for the correct join path.
